name: Aurora
description: Northern lights shimmer with gentle spectral color

prompts.SessionStart: shimmering aurora synth ascending with bright northern lights bloom, aurora borealis tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SessionEnd: aurora synth descending with smooth shimmering northern lights decay, aurora tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.Stop: single bright aurora synth chime with satisfying shimmering ring, aurora borealis tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct aurora shimmer tick with crisp northern lights click, aurora tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PostToolUse: short aurora synth chirp confirming with bright shimmering ping, aurora tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two shimmering aurora tones with questioning rising northern lights interval, aurora tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady aurora shimmer with clear rhythmic northern lights pulsing, aurora tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SubagentStart: aurora synth splitting into two diverging shimmering voices, aurora sound, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SubagentStop: clear aurora synth ping returning with distinct shimmering ring, aurora tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright aurora synth burst with energetic shimmering northern lights attack, aurora tone, ambient notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
